concerns.location: plan.md:Phase‑wise Plan & FR/SC Mapping table, Phase 2 description
concerns.text: The plan’s Extraction phase describes extracting fields but never names the `ABSummary` entity defined in data-model.md, nor states that the extracted records will conform to the `extracted_summary.schema.yaml` contract. This breaks the Plan ↔ data‑model and Plan ↔ contracts alignment.

Testing is described as '`pytest` + contract validation via `jsonschema`' but does not specify which contracts (audit_record.schema.yaml, extracted_summary.schema.yaml) are validated, leaving the Plan ↔ contracts link ambiguous.

concerns.location: plan.md:Constitution Check table, Principle V row
concerns.text: Principle V (Versioning Discipline) is claimed to be satisfied by noting that artifact hashes are recorded “outside scope of this plan.” The constitution requires every artifact to carry a content hash within the project’s workflow; delegating it outside the plan violates the non‑negotiable requirement.
